_meta.what: Optional name->CID registry for query.py's --account flag. Bare --cid runs never read this file.
_meta.how: Copy to accounts.json in the directory you run the script from (or pass any path via --accounts), then replace the placeholders with your own accounts.

schema.accounts: map of slug -> account entry; the slug is matchable and becomes the CSV filename segment
schema.accounts.<slug>.name: display name, matched case-insensitively
schema.accounts.<slug>.aliases: optional list of extra names that resolve to this account
